Document:
# Game Flow
This section covers how a round works from start to finish, and how players move through the game lifecycle.
## What This Section Covers
- [textlink="Round Flow & States" link="OE14_DEV_Flow_Rounds"] — the states a round goes through - [textlink="Player Spawn & Loading" link="OE14_DEV_Flow_Spawn"] — how players join and initialize - [textlink="Admin Tools & Commands" link="OE14_DEV_Flow_Admin"] — tools available to administrators - [textlink="Event Flow & Lifecycle" link="OE14_DEV_Flow_Events"] — entity and system lifecycle events
## High-Level Flow
Server starts | Players connect (lobby) | Round starts | Players spawn with their characters | Gameplay (events, combat, economy, etc.) | Round ends | Post-round summary | Restart or new round
## Key Systems
- [mono]GameTicker[/mono] — controls round state transitions - [mono]SpawnSystem[/mono] — handles player spawn logic - [mono]AdminSystem[/mono] — provides admin commands
